input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.8
            TITLE: judging sequence

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.8: Judging Sequence
S.2.8 Judging Sequence 
Presentation judging may be conducted in one or more phases.

final_answer: rule S.2.8: Judging Sequence Presentation judging may be conducted in one or more phases.
